items.title: EU sees 2025 pharma export uptick amid competitiveness concerns
items.summary: An analyst noted that this uptick may be a case of “frontloading”, meaning the EU’s 2026 pharma export growth outlook may not be as strong.

items.title: Pharma 5.0, Sustainability & Security: PHARMAP 2026 brings pharma’s future into focus
items.summary: Leading pharmaceutical industry players will convene at PHARMAP Congress 2026 on 20-21 April in the Netherlands, bringing together experts from manufacturing and packaging to quality assurance and regulatory fields for a broad, cross-sector view of emerging trends.

items.title: Travere Therapeutics gains FDA approval for sparsentan in FSGS
items.summary: Travere Therapeutics has received FDA approval for Filspari to reduce proteinuria in patients aged eight years and over with FSGS without nephrotic syndrome.

items.title: Novo Nordisk and OpenAI forge alliance to drive speedy drug development
items.summary: Novo Nordisk inks this deal with OpenAI as the total value of AI partnerships took a 120% YoY uptick between 2024 and 2025.

items.title: MSD, Daiichi Sankyo’s ifinatamab deruxtecan receives FDA priority
items.summary: MSD and Daiichi Sankyo have received priority review from the FDA for ifinatamab deruxtecan’s BLA to treat ES-SCLC.
